description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a moderately thick bezel. The screen is supported by a wide, circular pedestal stand that provides stability, and the monitor's body is relatively slim. The front of the monitor displays a digital interface with a blue background and a time and date, suggesting it is powered on. The monitor is accompanied by two rectangular accessories, likely a keyboard and a mouse, both matching the monitor's dark brown color. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding. The overall design is minimalistic, with smooth surfaces and a matte finish.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a thick bezel, circular pedestal stand, and matching keyboard and mouse, all in a dark brown matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a blue interface, thick bezel, and the matching keyboard and mouse in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the monitor and the circular pedestal stand, with the keyboard and mouse visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the monitor with no visible ports, buttons, or branding.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the monitor's thickness, the pedestal stand, and the arrangement of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, flat, and uniform in color with a matte brown finish, featuring sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, circular pedestal base made of the same brown material as the monitor, with a solid, stable appearance and no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
